allOf.description: The nextToken value to include in a future GetFindingsReportAccountSummary request. When the results of a GetFindingsReportAccountSummary request exceed maxResults, this value can be used to retrieve the next page of results. This value is null when there are no more results to return.
The return list of FindingsReportSummary objects taht contain summaries of analysis results for all profiling groups in your AWS account.
